---
title: "Theory"
toc: false
---
::: {.eyebrow}
the model, from the ground up
:::

What `plant` actually solves, and why. Consolidates material currently
scattered across papers and vignettes.

- [The size-structured PDE](size-structured-pde.qmd)
- [Assimilation & hydraulics](assimilation-hydraulics.qmd)
- [Adaptive dynamics](adaptive-dynamics.qmd)
